articles.title: What is Norway's 'Viking Row'? Fans' viral World Cup celebration sends social media into a frenzy
articles.description: Norway's 'Viking Row' fan celebration has taken the FIFA World Cup by storm, captivating audiences worldwide. Inspired by Viking heritage, supporters and players alike perform synchronized rowing motions, symbolizing unity and a fighting spirit. This viral trend, seen from stadiums to New York City, highlights the team's strong performance, with Erling Haaland leading the charge.

articles.title: Resolute Ghana rip open England’s limitations
articles.description: In the goalless draw, the African nation laid bare England's lack of imagination when confronted with a low block

articles.title: Stand-in Goalkeeper Frustrates England As Three Lions Play Goalless Draw Against Ghana In FIFA World Cup
articles.description: England dominated possession and had 19 shots to their opponents' two, yet rarely looked like scoring past Ghana's goalkeeper Benjamin Asare in a match watched by 63,983 fans.

articles.title: England stumble against fearless Ghana as Tuchel's side waste chance to seal knockout spot
articles.description: England struggled to a goalless draw with Ghana, failing to convert possession into scoring chances.

articles.title: England vs Ghana – Three Lions held to a goalless draw; player ratings
articles.description: A defensively astute performance by Ghana saw it hold England to a goalless draw in their Group L match at the Boston Stadium in Massachusetts on Tuesday.

articles.title: "Trying to force a kiss": Shakira's unexpected FIFA World Cup kiss sends social media into meltdown as fans fear the worst
articles.description: Shakira's appearance at Argentina's 2-0 FIFA World Cup win over Austria sparked online concern after a live broadcast showed someone kissing her on the cheek. Fans questioned the awkward moment before it was revealed that the person was her 13-year-old son, Milan, whose face was partially hidden by a cap. The revelation quickly calmed social media, while Argentina secured a knockout-stage berth thanks to Lionel Messi's brace.

articles.title: House of the Dragon star Matt Smith makes bold FIFA World Cup confession as England chases glory
articles.description: House of the Dragon star Matt Smith revealed he would rather see England win the FIFA World Cup than receive 10 Academy Awards. Speaking before England's Group L clash against Ghana, the actor said the country's football success means more to him than Hollywood recognition. England opened the tournament with a 4-2 win over Croatia and could secure a place in the knockout stage with another victory under Thomas Tuchel.

articles.title: "That guy's not coming back": Lamar Jackson's Ravens future grows more uncertain after former NFL scout's bold claim
articles.description: Former NFL scout John Middlekauff believes Lamar Jackson is no longer the explosive runner who dominated early in his career, saying, "That guy's not coming back." While he praised Jackson's growth as a passer, he stressed the Ravens must find the right balance between protecting their quarterback and maximizing his strengths. With Jackson's contract extension looming, Baltimore faces important decisions about his future and the team's long-term direction.

articles.title: Luka Modric Becomes 4th Footballer In The World To Play 200 International Matches
articles.description: Modrić is the first Croatian and only the fourth player in the world to play 200 or more international matches. He made his international debut on March 1, 2006.

articles.title: Watch: IShowSpeed loses it as Cristiano Ronaldo scores his first goal of the 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's first goal at the 2026 FIFA World Cup ignited an explosive reaction from superfan IShowSpeed, whose stadium celebration went viral. The streamer's ecstatic display, fueled by his long-standing admiration for the Portuguese star, nearly overshadowed Ronaldo's brace against Uzbekistan. This moment highlights the increasing synergy between online personalities and major sporting events, captivating global audiences.

articles.title: Lionel Messi becomes World Cup's top scorer with brace vs Austria
articles.description: Lionel Messi became the FIFA World Cup's all-time leading goal-scorer with 18 goals, surpassing Miroslav Klose. His brace led Argentina to victory over Austria, and he set a new record for most wins (18) by a player in the tournament.

articles.title: IND vs IRE: Will Suryansh Shedge Make His Team India Debut in T20I Series against Ireland?
articles.description: All-rounder Nitish Kumar Reddy has been ruled out of the T20I series against Ireland and England due to a quadriceps injury. Mumbai's Suryansh Shedge has earned his maiden national call-up as a replacement. Given his recent form and the team's need for a pace-bowling all-rounder, Shedge is a strong contender to make his international debut.

articles.description: France delivered a dominant performance at the FIFA World Cup 2026, defeating Iraq 3-0 with brilliant attacking football and strong defensive control.
